Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Canada Shipping Act, 2001 (certificate of competency)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Canada Shipping Act, 2001 (certificate of competency)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Canada Shipping Act, 2001 in order for a foreign national who holds a diploma issued by a prescribed Canadian maritime institution and for whom a permanent residence application is being processed to be eligible for a certificate of competency.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The definition qualified person in section 2 of the Canada Shipping Act, 2001 is amended by striking out âorâ at the end of paragraph (a) and by adding the following after that paragraph:

Paragraph.Label: (a.1)
Paragraph.Text: a foreign national within the meaning of subsection 2(1) of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act who is referred to in subsection 88(1); or

Section.Text: Subsection 88(1) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Section.MarginalNote: Holder of a certificate of competency

Subsection.Text: Only the following persons may hold a certificate of competency that is issued under this Part:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: a permanent resident within the meaning of subsection 2(1) of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: a foreign national within the meaning of subsection 2(1) of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act who holds a diploma issued by a prescribed Canadian maritime institution and for whom a permanent residence application under that Act is being processed.

Section.Text: Section 100 of the Act is amended by adding the following after paragraph (c):

Paragraph.Label: (c.1)
Paragraph.Text: designating Canadian maritime institutions for the purpose of subsection 88(1);
